# Corpus Oracle Results

> Auto-generated by the [corpus oracle workflow](../.github/workflows/corpus-oracle.yml).
> Last updated: 2026-03-26

Compares nitrocop against RuboCop on 5,590 open-source Ruby repos.
Every offense is compared by file path, line number, and cop name.

## Summary

| Metric | Value |
|--------|------:|
| Repos | 5590 |
| Repos with 100% match | 224 |
| Files inspected | 610,193 |
| Offenses compared | 30,061,403 |
| Matches (both agree) | 28,313,268 |
| FP (nitrocop extra) | 40,168 |
| FN (nitrocop missing) | 1,707,967 |
| Registered cops | 910 |
| Cops with exact match | 110 |
| Cops with divergence | 791 |
| Cops with no corpus data | 9 |
| **Match rate** | **94.1%** |
| Repos with errors | 1 |
